content.explanation:
**Could Have — Past Possibility & Missed Opportunity:**

"Could have" के 3 uses हैं:

**Use 1 — Past Ability Not Used:** (हो सकता था — but didn't)
🇮🇳 मैं जीत सकता था। (but I didn't)
🇬🇧 I **could have won**.

**Use 2 — Past Possibility:** (संभावना थी)
🇮🇳 और बुरा हो सकता था।
🇬🇧 It **could have been** worse.

**Use 3 — Criticism/Missed Opportunity:**
🇮🇳 तुम मुझे call कर सकते थे!
🇬🇧 You **could have called** me!

**Structure:** Subject + could have + V3

**Negative:** Subject + **couldn't have** + V3
🇮🇳 मैं बिना तुम्हारी मदद के नहीं कर सकता था।
🇬🇧 I **couldn't have done** it without your help.
rules: Could have + V3 = past ability that was NOT used
Could have + V3 = past possibility (might have happened)
Could have + V3 = mild criticism about missed opportunity
Couldn't have + V3 = impossible in the past
Polite suggestion about past: "We could have taken a taxi."
Compare: Must have (certain) vs Could have (possible) vs Should have (duty)
content.memoryTrick: **Could Have = Doors That Were Open 🚪** — 'Could have' का मतलब है एक door open थी, पर हमने उसमें walk नहीं किया। आज उस open door को याद कर रहे हैं।

examples.hindi: मैं पहले बेहतर तैयारी कर सकता था।
examples.english: I could have prepared better earlier.

examples.hindi: वह doctor बन सकता था, पर engineer बना।
examples.english: He could have become a doctor, but became an engineer.

examples.hindi: accident और बुरा हो सकता था।
examples.english: The accident could have been worse.

examples.hindi: तुम कम से कम message कर सकते थे!
examples.english: You could have at least sent a message!

examples.hindi: हम यह deal बहुत पहले close कर सकते थे।
examples.english: We could have closed this deal much earlier.

examples.hindi: उसकी मदद के बिना मैं यह नहीं कर सकता था।
examples.english: I couldn't have done this without her help.

mistakes.why: V3 of go = gone, not went

mistakes.wrong: I couldn't have to do it.

speakingTips: Appreciating others: 'I couldn't have done this without you.'
Near-miss situations: 'It could have been a serious accident.'
Office feedback: 'We could have communicated better on this project.'

vocabulary.example: I could have used that opportunity.
I was capable — I could have done it.
No regrets — but I could have tried harder.
She had the potential — she could have succeeded.
We could have taken an alternative route.
We are fortunate — it could have been disastrous.
You could have achieved much more.
We could have prevented this mistake.

practice.hindi: मैं और बेहतर तैयारी कर सकता था।
practice.english: I could have prepared better.
alternatives: i could have been better prepared.

practice.hindi: यह situation और बुरी हो सकती थी।
practice.english: This situation could have been worse.
alternatives: things could have been much worse.

practice.hindi: तुम कम से कम एक message कर सकते थे!
practice.english: You could have at least sent one message!
alternatives: you could have at least texted!

practice.hindi: वह doctor बन सकता था।
practice.english: He could have become a doctor.
alternatives: he was capable of becoming a doctor.

practice.hindi: मैं पहले ही यह बात कह सकता था।
practice.english: I could have said this earlier.
alternatives: i could have mentioned this sooner.

practice.hindi: हम taxi ले सकते थे — घर पहुँचते।
practice.english: We could have taken a taxi — we would have reached home.
alternatives: we should have taken a taxi.

practice.hindi: तुम्हारी मदद के बिना मैं यह नहीं कर सकता था।
practice.english: I couldn't have done this without your help.
alternatives: this would have been impossible without your help.

practice.hindi: वह उस job के लिए apply कर सकती थी।
practice.english: She could have applied for that job.
alternatives: she had the option to apply for that job.

practice.hindi: accident बहुत गंभीर हो सकती थी।
practice.english: The accident could have been very serious.
alternatives: the crash could have been much worse.

practice.hindi: हम यह deal बहुत पहले close कर सकते थे।
practice.english: We could have closed this deal much earlier.
alternatives: we had the chance to close this deal sooner.

practice.hindi: वह उस competition में जीत सकता था।
practice.english: He could have won that competition.
alternatives: he had a chance to win that contest.

practice.hindi: तुम मुझे पहले inform कर सकते थे!
practice.english: You could have informed me earlier!
alternatives: you should have told me sooner!

practice.hindi: मैं उस समय ज़्यादा save कर सकता था।
practice.english: I could have saved more at that time.
alternatives: i had the opportunity to save more then.

practice.hindi: वह पहले से ही famous हो सकती थी।
practice.english: She could have been famous by now.
alternatives: she had the potential to be famous.

practice.hindi: हम एक अलग route ले सकते थे।
practice.english: We could have taken a different route.
alternatives: we had the option of another route.

practice.hindi: वह यह गलती बचा सकता था।
practice.english: He could have avoided this mistake.
alternatives: he had the chance to avoid this error.

practice.hindi: तुम उससे directly बात कर सकते थे।
practice.english: You could have spoken to her directly.
alternatives: you had the option to talk to her in person.

practice.hindi: हम और ज़्यादा careful हो सकते थे।
practice.english: We could have been more careful.
alternatives: we should have been more cautious.

practice.hindi: वह रुककर एक बार check कर सकता था।
practice.english: He could have stopped and checked once.
alternatives: he should have paused to verify.

practice.hindi: हम बहुत पहले यहाँ आ सकते थे।
practice.english: We could have come here much earlier.
alternatives: we had a chance to arrive here sooner.

practice.hindi: तुम एक better answer दे सकते थे।
practice.english: You could have given a better answer.
alternatives: you had the ability to answer better.
practice.hint: could have + given a better answer

practice.hindi: वह professor बन सकती थी।
practice.english: She could have become a professor.
alternatives: she had the potential to be a professor.

practice.hindi: यह project कम budget में हो सकता था।
practice.english: This project could have been done in less budget.
alternatives: we could have completed this project with less money.
practice.hint: could have + been done in less budget

practice.hindi: मैं उस समय better salary negotiate कर सकता था।
practice.english: I could have negotiated a better salary at that time.
alternatives: i had the chance to ask for a higher salary.

practice.hindi: उस situation को better handle किया जा सकता था।
practice.english: That situation could have been handled better.
alternatives: that situation deserved better handling.

practice.hindi: वह earlier आ सकता था।
practice.english: He could have come earlier.
alternatives: he had the option to arrive sooner.

practice.hindi: हम दोनों साथ मिलकर यह solve कर सकते थे।
practice.english: We both could have solved this together.
alternatives: both of us had the ability to solve this.

practice.hindi: तुम उसे एक chance दे सकते थे।
practice.english: You could have given him one chance.
alternatives: you had the option to give him a chance.

practice.hindi: मैं उस flight को catch कर सकता था।
practice.english: I could have caught that flight.
alternatives: i had the chance to make that flight.

practice.hindi: यह project on time deliver हो सकता था।
practice.english: This project could have been delivered on time.
alternatives: this could have been finished on schedule.
practice.hint: could have + been delivered on time
